591 W3A W3A_PPV_STUS_SW (W3A) Resident up to date with PPV status CHAR 1 Resident up to date with Pneumococcal Polysaccharide Vaccine (PPV) status. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown
592 W3B W3B_PPV_NOT_RCVD_RSN_ID (W3B) Reason PPV not received CHAR 1 Reason Pneumococcal Polysaccharide not
